title: rubus almus
intro: Rubus almus, also known as the Arctous rubra or Red Lingonberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to northern Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high tannin content, which has anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The health benefits of Rubus almus include reducing fever, relieving diarrhea and bleeding, and supporting the immune system. Rubus almus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
